rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in annex agree blocks within component type or implementation scopes as appropriate
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range constraints
generic_rules: Declare helper booleans for range checks using named limits
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions are typically placed in component type annexes; assignments in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not define range checks without visible identifiers or named constants
Avoid type mismatches between helper declarations and the expressions they represent
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
